name: alert
description: Semantic alert boxes with role='alert' and info/warning/destructive/success variants
whenToUse: Use for system-level feedback requiring immediate attention — form errors, operation results, destructive-action warnings.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for general information or tips — use Callout instead. Alert implies the reader must act or be immediately aware.
example:
<Alert variant="destructive">
  <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your session has expired. Please sign in again.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
